raw_responses.title: TransMLA Multi-Head Latent Attention (2502.07864)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: latent KV serves as shared large head interacting with all query/output heads; decoupled RoPE positional embedding; cross-head synchronization via shared latent reference.

raw_responses.title: DuoAttention Retrieval Streaming Heads (2410.10819)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: dual-channel attention; retrieval heads with full KV vs streaming heads with constant-length KV + attention sink anchor; differentiated head roles.
